title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 215.230 - Termination or dissolution of commission, effect of
text:
215.230.  Termination or dissolution of commission, effect of. — Upon termination or dissolution, all rights and properties of the commission, including the housing development fund, shall pass to and be vested in the state of Missouri, subject to the rights of lienholders and other creditors.
(L. 1969 H.B. 130 § 33)
